name: starbridge-version-coordinator
description: Plan safe StarBridge configurations for different creative-software and project generations.

interface.shortDescription: Match software versions to safe StarBridge routes.
interface.longDescription: Create a conservative Codex plan for Photoshop, Illustrator, AutoCAD, Blender, ComfyUI, and CapCut/Jianying, and migrate StarBridge v5-v8 workflows to v9.
defaultPrompt: 按本机软件版本生成安全的 StarBridge 配置。
把现有 StarBridge v5-v8 工作流迁移到 v9。
为 Photoshop 和 Illustrator 选择兼容桥接方式。
